attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.CREATED_ON, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES,
(
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,ORGANIZATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES
 minus
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,ORGANIZATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID=STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.ORGANIZATION_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_CMF_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES)
